problem: What causes normal proteins to misfold into prions and spread through tissue?
mechanism: Viral vector delivery of therapeutic gene
hypothesis: The key to What causes normal proteins to misfold into prions and spread through tissue? is Viral vector delivery of therapeutic gene — specifically Viral vector delivery — which would help 1,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 14 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
